title: <div><font face=".AppleColorEmojiUI">📢</font> **Compose an original discussion
content:
📢 **Compose an original discussion post (at least 350 words) responding to the following:**

1️⃣ **How does Eudora Welty use symbolism in *A Worn Path* to convey themes of perseverance and sacrifice?**
2️⃣ **Identify at least two symbols from the text and analyze their significance in Phoenix Jackson’s journey.**
3️⃣ **Include at least two direct quotes from the story and explain their relevance to your argument.**

### **6.2 Discussion Post Guidelines**
📝 **Original Post Due:** **Friday, February 7, 11:59 PM**
💬 **Reply to Two Peers (250 words each):** **Due Monday, February 10, 11:59 PM**

### **6.3 Assessment Criteria**
✅ **Original Post (40%)**: Depth of analysis, use of textual evidence, engagement with the prompt.
✅ **Replies (40%)**: Thoughtfulness of response, engagement with peers, use of textual support.
context: From document: # **Week 5 Schedule: Symbolism and Social Justice in Literature… — chunk 15 (chunk 15/24)
